text: We begin with division of the inferior pulmonary ligament.
A tissue sealer was used to open the mediastinal pleura, exposing the epiphrenic diverticulum.
The diverticulum was easily located and shown here at the mid-esophagus.
The diverticulum was dissected out by performing a superior and inferior myotomy to expose the entire diverticulum down to its neck.
A 56 French bougie was then inserted and the diverticulum was transected using a linear stapler.
The specimen was removed with a retrieval device.
Intraoperative endoscopy was performed with air insufflation.
A water submersion test revealed no evidence of leak.
The staple line was then inspected.
A 24 French chest tube was then inserted.
